title: Multiverse Retexture
description: Resource pack that changes the textures of the Multiverse mod, inspired by JICKLUS
body:
New textures for a great multiverse mod, but I don't like the original textures, so I made them look different from the textures from the **JICKLUS** pack. At the moment, everything has been changed except for the particles and two mobs.

![:)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e8f2fa3cd7becf292f4cd3ce7c2f4096585e6a5.png)
